title: Prodius
description: AI-powered music production assistant that helps composers generate chord progressions, arrange tracks, and master final mixes using machine learning models.

title: AudioMotion
description: Real-time audio visualization tool that transforms sound into dynamic, customizable visual displays using WebGL and Web Audio API for immersive listening experiences.

title: MarcaP
description: Personal brand site and creative portfolio that embodies the fusion of software architecture and music composition through immersive design and GSAP-driven interactions.
